violations.text: Sauce, which was previously cooked and cooled, was not reheated before being placed into the hot holding unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Sauce was reheated to 165 and put back into the hot holding unit at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Various food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The sanitizer dispenser for the 3-bay sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The 3-bay sink drain plugs were observed in poor repair. Establishment is to replace drain plugs. The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris and grease build up. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Corrective Action - Establishment is re-printing finalized menu and is to include consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

Wood is used in the construction of prep table. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Wood is to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
The tile floor in the kitchen by the entry doors is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
